title: Input validation for CLI args
description: Reject empty/whitespace-only CLI arguments with clear error message and non-zero exit code. Add unit tests.

title: CLI help system
description: Implement --help/-h globally and per subcommand. Print usage text and exit 0. No stack traces in any error output.

title: CLI --version flag
description: Add --version/-v flag that prints 'fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0' and exits 0.

title: CLI update command
description: Implement 'update' subcommand with --id required and optional --title/--content/--tags. Calls PUT /api/notes/:id with JSON body.

title: CLI delete command
description: Implement 'delete' subcommand with --id required. Calls DELETE /api/notes/:id and prints confirmation.

title: CLI create command
description: Implement 'create' subcommand with --title, --content required and optional --tags. Calls POST /api/notes with JSON body.

title: CLI read command
description: Implement 'read' subcommand requiring --id flag. Calls GET /api/notes/:id and prints JSON result to stdout.

title: CLI list command
description: Implement 'list' subcommand with optional --tag and --q filters. Calls GET /api/notes with query params and prints JSON results to stdout.

title: CLI CRUD commands (list/read/create/update/delete)
description: Implement five subcommands against the NoteAPI: list (optional --tag/--q filter), read (--id required), create (--title, --content required), update (--id required, --title/--content optional), delete (--id required). Each command calls the API and prints results to stdout. Non-zero exit on API error.

title: CLI help system and input validation
description: The CLI must support --help/-h flags globally and per subcommand, printing usage and exiting 0. Input validation must reject empty or whitespace-only arguments with a clear error message and non-zero exit code. No stack traces in error output.

title: Add input validation for empty or blank strings
description: When user passes empty string or whitespace-only string as argument, reject with clear error message. Non-zero exit code. Add unit test. Ref: gh-toy-v6z.

title: Add --version flag to CLI
description: The CLI tool should support a --version (or -v) flag that prints the current version string and exits with code 0. Acceptance: running ./tool --version prints fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0, exit code 0, works alongside other flags.

title: Add config file support (~/.fleet-e2e-toy.yaml)
description: Allow users to persist default flag values in a YAML config file at ~/.fleet-e2e-toy.yaml so they don't have to repeat common flags on every run. Acceptance: reads config on startup, CLI flags override config, warns on unknown keys, documents supported keys in README.

title: Handle SIGINT gracefully (Ctrl-C)
description: The tool should catch SIGINT (Ctrl-C) and exit cleanly without a Python traceback or incomplete output. Acceptance: Ctrl-C prints 'Interrupted.' and exits with code 130, no stack trace shown, partial output files cleaned up.

title: Add JSON output mode via --json flag
description: Add a --json flag so all command output can be emitted as machine-readable JSON for scripting and CI pipelines. Acceptance: --json flag accepted on any subcommand, output is valid JSON, human-readable output is default, errors also JSON-formatted.

title: Tag filtering endpoint
description: GET /api/notes?tag=work returns only notes with that tag. Already partially implemented - needs tests.
